headline: Latest News In AI Chips - Revolutionizing Fleet Charging with Nexus Megawatt System
summary: Tellus Power has unveiled the Nexus Megawatt Charging System (MCS), a central feature of its innovative Nexus platform aimed at enhancing high-power distributed charging for fleet and commercial applications. The modular system delivers power outputs ranging from 600kW to 1.2MW and supports various charging standards to facilitate deployment across diverse site configurations. Designed to improve energy utilization and power management, the Nexus MCS centralizes power distribution to...
